title: Skeleton Rebellion Collection
description: A bold series of 16 edgy skeleton illustrations featuring attitude, cigars, and street style aesthetics.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Green Smoke Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a torn black hoodie with red eyes, smoking a cigar with green mystical smoke and flipping the bird.

images.title: Crossbones Cigar Skeleton
images.description: Classic skull and crossbones arrangement with a lit cigar and dark smoke trails against black.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Gold Chain Recline
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a hooded sweatshirt with a thick gold chain, smoking and gesturing.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Elegance
images.description: A sophisticated skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora with glowing green eyes and mystical smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Fedora Intensity
images.description: An intense skeleton wearing both hoodie and fedora, surrounded by swirling smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Vertical Stance
images.description: A standing skeleton in a torn hoodie with gold chain, holding a cigar and making a hand gesture.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Chill Mode
images.description: A laid-back skeleton in a hoodie with silver chain, reclining with cigar and attitude.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Lounger
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a full pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with cigar and hand on hat.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Cool
images.description: A rugged skeleton in a leather jacket and fedora with red eyes, reclining with cigar.

images.title: Grim Reaper: Hooded Lounger
images.description: A skeleton in dark hooded robes, reclining with cigar and glowing red eyes.

images.title: Leather Jacket Skeleton: Fedora Attitude
images.description: A skeleton in a brown leather trench coat and fedora, one gold tooth visible, smoking with style.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Pinstripe Relax
images.description: A relaxed skeleton in a pinstripe suit and fedora, reclining with legs crossed and cigar.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Toxic Green
images.description: A skeleton in a torn hoodie with skull pendant gold chain, exhaling thick green smoke.

images.title: Gangster Skeleton: Red Accent
images.description: A stylish skeleton in a black suit with red shirt and fedora, reclining with cigar and smoke.

images.title: Hoodie Skeleton: Monochrome Edge
images.description: A stark black and white skeleton in a hoodie and jeans, smoking with clean line art style.

images.title: Bare Skeleton: Classic Recline
images.description: A pure skeleton without clothing, reclining in classic pose with cigar and attitude.
